metadata.description: Hugo's portable AI skills for document conversion, agent-native EPUB translation, structured problem solving, structured learning, and wind power business workflow frameworks

plugins.name: hugo-skills
plugins.description: Portable AI skills for Markdown document conversion, agent-native EPUB translation, structured problem solving, six-stage structured learning, and wind power business workflow frameworks. Note: this plugin ships only the skill files; install each skill's Python dependencies from the installed location before running scripts.
